TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Khpan == u sulit nu Hulam: Ś§ßŚĹéťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Taoyuan a kuwan ku niyazu' nu Khpan. u kasalumaluma' nu Khpan sa, 30 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 91 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 80 ku tademaw, pakalatu 88%. u zuma sa, cay ku Yingcumin, 11 ku tademaw, pakalatu 12%. u kasabinacadan, Tayan(Tayal) 75%, Pangcah(Amis) 3%, zumazuma 10%. u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin u siwkay nu Yincumin u Yincumin sananay, u saayaway a muenengay a tademaw itini, itini uyiniyan a subal. u sasubana'ay a kamu sa, Taywan Yincumin sa mikitinay "Timul Subal kamu cidekay " saan. u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). situlu ku kakuniza nu Yincumincu,sakacacay ku ibukelalay, sakatusa ku ibuyuay, sakatulu sa ku tangbulanay. tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 12 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 12 a bulad pulung sausi (565,561), Pangcah (211,031), Tayan (90,884), Paywan (101,472), Yuwatan (58,894), Rukay (13,392), Puyuma (14,340), Cou (6,667), Saysiat (6,662), Yami (4,629), Saw (799), Kabalan (1,482), Taluku (31,826), Sakizaya (958), Sejek (10,193), Laaluwa (404), Kanakanabu (343), zuma (11,585)
S.PHON: == kńßpan == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: **** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i taojuan a kuwan ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu kńßpan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu kńßpan sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, ** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku jiŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u kasabina ¶adan, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) **%, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) *%, zumazuma **%. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u siwkaj nu jin ¶umin u jin ¶umin sananaj, u saajawaj a mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw itini, itini ujinijan a subar~…ĺ. u sasubana Ē~ °aj a kamu sa, tajwan jin ¶umin sa mikitinaj "timur~…ĺ subar~…ĺ kamu ¶id…ôkaj " saan. u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). situr~…ĺu ku kakuniza nu jin ¶umin ¶u,saka ¶a ¶aj ku ibuk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj, sakatusa ku ibujuaj, sakatur~…ĺu sa ku taŇčbur~…ĺanaj. tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an ** a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
S.FORM: == Khpan == u sulit nu Hulam: Ś§ßŚĹéťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Taoyuan a kuwan ku niyazu' nu Khpan. u kasalumaluma' nu Khpan sa, 30 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 91 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 80 ku tademaw, pakalatu 88%. u zuma sa, cay ku Yingcumin, 11 ku tademaw, pakalatu 12%. u kasabinacadan, Tayan(Tayal) 75%, Pangcah(Amis) 3%, zumazuma 10%. u cidekay nu Taywan yincumin u siwkay nu Yincumin u Yincumin sananay, u saayaway a muenengay a tademaw itini, itini uyiniyan a subal. u sasubana'ay a kamu sa, Taywan Yincumin sa mikitinay "Timul Subal kamu cidekay " saan. u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). situlu ku kakuniza nu Yincumincu,sakacacay ku ibukelalay, sakatusa ku ibuyuay, sakatulu sa ku tangbulanay. tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 12 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 12 a bulad pulung sausi (565,561), Pangcah (211,031), Tayan (90,884), Paywan (101,472), Yuwatan (58,894), Rukay (13,392), Puyuma (14,340), Cou (6,667), Saysiat (6,662), Yami (4,629), Saw (799), Kabalan (1,482), Taluku (31,826), Sakizaya (958), Sejek (10,193), Laaluwa (404), Kanakanabu (343), zuma (11,585)
S.PHON: == kńßpan == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: **** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i taojuan a kuwan ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu kńßpan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu kńßpan sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, ** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku jiŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u kasabina ¶adan, tajan(tajar~…ĺ) **%, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) *%, zumazuma **%. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u siwkaj nu jin ¶umin u jin ¶umin sananaj, u saajawaj a mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw itini, itini ujinijan a subar~…ĺ. u sasubana Ē~ °aj a kamu sa, tajwan jin ¶umin sa mikitinaj "timur~…ĺ subar~…ĺ kamu ¶id…ôkaj " saan. u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). situr~…ĺu ku kakuniza nu jin ¶umin ¶u,saka ¶a ¶aj ku ibuk…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj, sakatusa ku ibujuaj, sakatur~…ĺu sa ku taŇčbur~…ĺanaj. tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an ** a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
